title: Content of the therapeutic protocol
steps: Introduction, briefing, primary assessing and introduction to the course
Giving an introduction about animals and their specific characteristics
Taking children to the place that animals were kept
Spending time in the place that animals were kept, talking about them and how to communicate with them
Convincing children to come closer and touch and pet them
Playing with animal and feeding them
Participation in activities like washing and feeding the animals
creator: Mohammad Tahan
